name: Ice-Creamy Blueberry Yoghurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the blueberries with the juice of 2 oranges and 1 lemon to a puree.
2. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup sugar.
4. Beat together 1 cup low-fat yoghurt and 2 tablespoons low-fat milk for about 5 minutes to lighten them.
5. Add 1/4 cup of sugar and beat for a further minute.
6. Gently combine the fruit preparation with the milk and yoghurt mixture.
7. Either freeze in an ice cream maker or put the mixture in the freezer in a bowl. As the mixture hardens, whisk it two or three times.
8. When it is too firm to whisk any more, it is ready.
Makes 10 servings.
